commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e27f0ac840384ad92ad1e49da07e8657026b5a19)
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes cron payload outcome resolution to treat matching trailing search-failure payloads as nonfatal after earlier successful cron output, with helper tests for search-miss and non-search-error cases.

PR surface: Source +18, Tests +54. Total +72 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source inspection gives a high-confidence helper-level reproduction: current main marks a final error payload fatal, while the PR adds a unit case for success text followed by a matching search-failure payload. I did not run tests because this review is read-only and dependency/test commands can write artifacts.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The PR needs contributor real behavior proof and a maintainer-visible patch revision for the classifier bug; ClawSweeper should not queue an automated repair while the external proof gate is unmet.

target.title: fix(cron): ignore optional scanner search misses
target.body:
## Summary
- Treat trailing optional scanner search-miss payloads as nonfatal when prior scanner output is deliverable.
- Keep search misses fatal when there is no successful scanner output.
- Preserve fatal classification for non-search tool errors.

## Verification
- `node /home/henry/.cache/node/corepack/v1/pnpm/10.33.0/bin/pnpm.cjs exec vitest run src/cron/isolated-agent/helpers.test.ts` - 28/28 passed.

## Notes
- Rebased Mike's local commit `61017e26fef06f45d33baefbd25bce51fca56af9` onto fresh upstream `origin/main` because upstream moved and direct push to `openclaw/openclaw` is unavailable for `henryyuen168-ship-it` (`viewerPermission=READ`).
- Rebased commit: `e27f0ac840384ad92ad1e49da07e8657026b5a19`.
target.author: henryyuen168-ship-it

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
